description: Canonical project structure for D7460N Architecture

file_responsibilities.index.html: Complete DOM structure — single SPA entry point
file_responsibilities.assets/css/layout.css: The only active CSS file — CSS Grid Holy Grail layout and all UI
file_responsibilities.assets/js/api.js: API transport utilities — base URL, endpoint resolution, fetch/parse
file_responsibilities.assets/js/app.js: JS entrypoint — startup checks, console reset, initialization wiring
file_responsibilities.assets/js/oninput.js: Shared oninput lifecycle — binds nav inputs, routes API calls, injects data
file_responsibilities.assets/js/storage.js: Generic storage utilities — localStorage primary, cookie fallback
file_responsibilities.assets/js/tour.js: Safe placeholder module for future onboarding/tour logic

html_skeleton.description: Full-bleed Holy Grail layout from index.html

rules: Full-bleed Holy Grail layout via app-container custom element
One script[type=module] tag before closing body tag
assets/css/layout.css is the only active CSS file
assets/js/ contains modular JS runtime files for transport only
